creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: wen
Date: Fri May  6 08:45:03 UTC 2016
New revision: 414686
URL: https://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/414686

Log:
  DNA query sequences against a protein reference database (BLASTP and BLASTX
  alignment mode). The speedup over BLAST is up to 20,000 on short reads at a
  typical sensitivity of 90-99% relative to BLAST depending on the data and
  settings.

  WWW: http://ab.inf.uni-tuebingen.de/software/diamond/

  PR:		208998
  Submitted by:	jrm@ftfl.ca

Changes:
  head/biology/Makefile
  head/biology/diamond/
  head/biology/diamond/Makefile
  head/biology/diamond/distinfo
  head/biology/diamond/files/
  head/biology/diamond/files/patch-CMakeLists.txt
  head/biology/diamond/pkg-descr
